detail.description:
Zero Out All Despair
Smilegate's new title, "Chaos Zero Nightmare," is now open!
Board the SS Nightmare now!

Chaos.

A cosmic disaster that struck without warning.
The beginning, or the end, of every story.
"Chaos," a black fog that consumes planets, distorting their environment and lifeforms.
..
